problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
